items.name: Rune brutal
items.detail: Post-tax margin per unit at conservative percentile targets. Buy limit 11,000/4h, realistic fill 2,696/4h (10% of daily volume). Dependability 0.99 — closer to 1.00 means the margin recurs all day, not one lucky burst.

items.name: Bastion potion (3)→(4)

items.name: Amulet of glory(6)

items.detail: Buy at 9,971 gp, alch for 10,575 gp (nature rune already deducted). Supply-capped at 4,800 casts/4h — buy limit and daily volume, not the 1,200/hr cast rate, are usually the bottleneck.

sections.title: Money Makers
sections.note: ≥100K gp/hr, filtered for a mid-level member account · badge = intensity

items.name: Poisoning ammunition
items.detail: Setup: starting capital (recommended). Processing rates are re-derived from live prices (post-tax, volume-capped); other rates are the wiki's long-run averages.

items.name: Charging air orbs
items.detail: Requires Magic 66. Setup: Staff of air, Amulet of glory(6), unpowered orb, cosmic runes, energy potion(4), Weight-reducing clothing, food. Processing rates are re-derived from live prices (post-tax, volume-capped); other rates are the wiki's long-run averages.

sections.title: Combat You Can Do
sections.note: mobs & bosses within a mid-level account's stats and quest log · badge = intensity

items.name: Killing Scurrius
items.detail: Requires Combat level 60+, Prayer 43+, Combat 60+. Setup: Rat bone weapons, Prayer boosting gear, Scurrius/Strategies. Rate is the wiki's long-run drop-table average.

items.name: Killing chaos druids
items.detail: Requires Combat level 40+ (rec), Prayer 25 (rec), Combat 40+ (rec). Setup: weapon, gear, Wilderness, Amulet of glory, food, Looting bag, Herb sack. Rate is the wiki's long-run drop-table average.

items.name: Killing black unicorns
items.detail: Requires Combat level 40+ (rec), Prayer 25 (rec), Combat 40+ (rec). Setup: gear, Amulet of glory, Games necklace, food. Rate is the wiki's long-run drop-table average.

items.name: Killing chaos dwarves
items.detail: Requires Combat level 60+ (rec), combat 60+ (rec). Setup: Emergency teleport, armour, a weapon. Rate is the wiki's long-run drop-table average.

items.name: Killing hill giants
items.detail: Requires Attack 30+ (rec), Strength 30+ (rec), Defence 30+ (rec). Setup: Brass key, amulet of strength. Rate is the wiki's long-run drop-table average.
